home.titleLine1: View the election results from all over
home.description: This website displays the results of the Dutch parliamentary elections in a clear and interactive way. Users can view results per constituency and see how many votes each party received.
home.discoverText: Explore election results per region, constituency, polling station and postal code

constituency.selectDescription: Click a constituency on the left to view the party results.
constituency.partiesWithoutData: This party has no available data for this constituency.

chartPage.title: Chart per Party
chartPage.description: Click on a party to view votes per constituency.

municipalitiesPage.selectDescription: Click a municipality on the left to view the party results.

nationalPage.title: View national election results in charts
nationalPage.description: This page shows the national vote distribution in a visual way, helping you quickly understand which parties are leading and their share.
nationalPage.totalVotesDescription: Based on all available constituency results
nationalPage.partiesShownDescription: The largest parties are compared below

partiesPage.title: View political parties in the Netherlands
partiesPage.intro: Explore political parties and their candidates participating in the elections
partiesPage.searchPlaceholder: Type a party name or description

candidatesPage.title: Candidates of {party}
candidatesPage.intro: View the candidates of the party '{party}' participating in the elections.

forumPage.title: Discussion Forum
forumPage.description: View existing posts or create your own discussion.
forumPage.loginMessage: You must be logged in to create a post. Click below to login.

forumAdmin.label: Administration
forumAdmin.title: Edit forum posts
forumAdmin.description: Select a post and update the title or message.
forumAdmin.selectPrompt: Select a post to start editing.

postForum.newPostDescription: Share your opinion or start a discussion with other users.
postForum.title: Title
postForum.author: Name
postForum.publishSuccess: Your post has been published successfully.
postForum.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
postForum.loginRequiredDelete: Login is required to delete comments.
postForum.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
postForum.deleteNotAllowed: You are not allowed to delete this comment.
postForum.deletePostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
postForum.deletePostNotAllowed: You are not allowed to delete this post.
postForum.loginToComment: Log in to post a comment.
